enemies.name: Donovan McFadden
enemies.description: Did reveal unto the townsfolk an image most foul of Avery, captured at a moment unaware and thus breaching the the sacred trust binding them together. He hath sealed his fate at the top of this cursed register.

enemies.name: Julien Cox
enemies.description: Did engage in mockery of Avery's rat-like nature. Forsooth, his frequent attempts to remove Avery from a job must be listed. Joint with his lack of regard for timeliness and manner, he unrightly continueth to walk freely. Justice slumbers.

enemies.name: Quinn Micheal Shitlet
enemies.description: Didst on many occasions spread prevarications and pretense hither and thither throughout the lands. For this, hell will claim his tainted soul and he shall burn for all time.

enemies.name: Troy Bobo
enemies.description: Did commit a secret offense most vile and awful. A fool who knoweth not when to hold his tongue. Avery doth keep count.

enemies.name: Jeff Fuchs
enemies.description: No record on this list comes above the one documented here in terms of frequency of offenses. Avery hath been treated without regard of common manner on multiple occasions, chief among them being the wrongdoings levied onto the baseline. Whether it may be an absence of a transcribed score, an unwarranted fury around a simple improvised part, or a un-requested anger around a pep-band switch his own ignorance hath forgotten, the culmination of slights against Every shall never be forgotten. 0 stars. The disrespect is documented.

enemies.name: Kiana
enemies.description: No kind of life would be worth living without a court jester, yet Kiana's consistent attempts to fill this role are as noisesome as they are consistent. Avery hath not forgotten. She never forgets.

enemies.name: The Sun
enemies.description: Despite a high reverence for the burning celestial body in the heavens above, few hatreds bow to the hatred Avery feels lathering sunscreen to avoid the heat, burning, and general cancerous ailments it wreaks onto her fragile pale body. No further testimony shall be recorded here.
